body: Check all commandline commands and flags for consistency. E.g. currently labels are usually comma-separated, but 'list -l <label>' filtering doesnt support comman, but requires multiple '-l <label>'. First: make a list of all inconsistencies, add all as notes to this ticket for proper tracking. Second: present them to human project lead where best choice / fix isn't clear. Third: implement fixes.
title: Check cmdline ux for consistency
